# Next.js Sample Project

This workspace contains a Next.js sample application with:
- TypeScript support
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- ESLint for code linting
- App Router architecture
- Development server configured

## Getting Started

The project is ready to run with:
- `npm run dev` - Start development server (already configured as VS Code task)
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run lint` - Run ESLint

## Project Structure

- `src/app/` - Next.js App Router pages and layouts
- `public/` - Static assets
- Configuration files for TypeScript, Tailwind, and ESLint are included

## Development

The development server runs on [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000).
